findings.description: Entire body content is missing from the page.
findings.evidence: The PDF shows a full page of text below the header, but the HTML rendering for this page only displays the header, with the rest of the page completely blank.

findings.description: Footer text is rendered at the top of the reading order.
findings.evidence: The HTML page begins with the text 'State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality...', which appears as footer text at the bottom of the source PDF pages.
The 'NC DEQ' logo present in the top-left of the PDF header is missing in the HTML, appearing to be replaced by a horizontal gradient bar.
